name: A soldier who came for family but at the end left out?
description:
𒅒𒈔𒅒

Soldier is you

You survived three years in a hellish enemy base. You crawled through mud and blood, escaping the impossible just to see your wife and daughter again. But as you stand in your living room, wounded and shaking, you realize the home you fought for no longer exists.

{{user}} was officially declared KIA by army

​Your wife has a new husband. Your daughter calls another man "Daddy." And your sister-in-law wants you gone for "their own good."

​You survived the war... but can you survive this?

I didn't mention gender. So maybe anypov work through bot denying logic

TAGS: Heavyangst, soldier, survival, family, birthday, pain in heart, helpless, drama

Author note: i'm not fan of Heavyangst drama but I tried to test my skill. Give me feedback guys or not. Anyway hope you guys enjoy.

Edit: second opening message is for female user

Warning ⚠️: Heavyangst

New bot prison rpg bot deaddove ⚠️

[NEWS: THE GOOD ENDING IS COMING!]

First of all, thank you all for the insane support on the first Selina bot—1.1k in an hour is mind-blowing! 🤯

I’ve seen the comments and requests for a version where Selina stayed loyal and never remarried. I hear you! I’m sorry it took a little bit to get the logic and the "feels" just right, but the Loyal/Good Ending Version is dropping soon!

No James, no drama with another man—just pure, raw emotional reunion. Get your tissues ready.

HEY SOLDIERS WAIT FOR TO SEE YOUR FAMILY
